---
title: "Life Expectancy Analysis"
date: today
format: html
author: "William Howell"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(gapminder)
```

# Abstract

Here, I re-examine the analysis of Oeppen and Vaupel (2002).

# Analysis

```{r}
gapminder::gapminder_unfiltered %>% 
  group_by(year) %>% 
  filter(lifeExp == max(lifeExp)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(year, country, lifeExp) %>% 
  arrange(year) ->
  sumdat
```

I am going to add some text here
This is from testname
I added some text

this is even more text

Revised again.

This does not seem to be working.

I thought there was supposed to be a plot in here somewhere?
